name: Caribe Vegetable Sancocho
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green bell pepper, seeded & diced
2 cups yuca or dasheen, peeled & diced
1 cup West Indian pumpkin (or butternut squash), peeled & diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large saucepan.
2. Add the onion, bell pepper, and garlic. Sauté for about 7 minutes.
3. Add the water, carrots, yuca, potatoes, pumpkin (or butternut squash), plantain, and seasonings to the pan. Cook over medium-low heat for 40 to 45 minutes, stirring occasionally until the vegetables are tender and stew-like.
4. Remove from the heat and let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
